title: Don Baughman
compiled_truth: Don Baughman is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2002-03-18), Don Baughman sent 215 and received 1615 emails, totalling 1830 interactions. Top correspondents: [Dean Laurent](people/dean-laurent) (74), [Joe Errigo](people/joe-errigo) (63), [John Kinser](people/john-kinser) (61), [Juan Hernandez](people/juan-hernandez) (55), [Joe Stepenovitch](people/joe-stepenovitch) (52). Mailbox folders observed: 24_hr_power, calendar, contacts, deleted_items, importantstuff, inbox.
